blocks.text:
A battery of EMF $V$ drives a current through two resistors $R_1$ and $R_2$ connected in
**series**. Find the equivalent resistance $R_{eq}$ of the pair.

blocks.caption: Two resistors in series across a battery of EMF $V$.
blocks.source:
point a at=(0,0)
point b at=(4,0)
point c at=(4,2.4)
point d at=(0,2.4)
battery from=a to=d label="V"
resistor from=d to=c label="R_1"
resistor from=c to=b label="R_2"
wire from=b to=a

meta.solution:
The same current $I$ flows through both resistors, and the potential drops add:
$V = IR_1 + IR_2 = I(R_1 + R_2)$. Comparing with $V = I R_{eq}$ gives
$$R_{eq} = R_1 + R_2.$$
meta.subject: physics
meta.title: Resistors in Series
